channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Hwange-Nationalpark: Zimbabwe’s wild giant up close

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo shells out R160 million on Clifton mansion, becomes Black Coffee’s neighbour @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Property on exclusive Cape Town oceanfront famous for its white beaches The post Wicknell Chivayo shells out R160 million on Clifton mansion, becomes Black Coffee’s neighbour appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Transmedia targets radio frequency expansion, improved digital TV access
item.description: STATE-owned Transmedia, the legal body tasked with managing radio and TV signal distribution, is prioritising radio frequency expansion and digital television access, board chairperson Lawrence has said. Nkala, who was speaking at the institution’s 2026 annual general meeting (AG via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: WestProp posts US$34.6 million revenue as profits climb and clean audit boosts investor confidence @nehandaradio
item.description: WestProp Holdings has reported a strong set of financial results for 2025, with revenue rising 19 percent to US$34.6 million, a clean audit opinion and higher profits as the company continues pursuing its ambitious "Bringing Dubai to Zimbabwe" vision. The post WestProp posts US$3 via Nehanda Radio #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Fresh Kalos Meats Non-Payment Complaint Emerges As Six-Month Silence Deepens Over Mounting Allegations
item.description: By A Correspondent | ZimEye | A fresh complaint has surfaced against Kalos Meats, with yet another livestock supplier alleging... Continue reading "Fresh Kalos Meats Non-Payment Complaint Emerges As Six-Month Silence Deepens Over Mounting Allegations" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: New twice-yearly HIV injection set to boost medication adherence in Zimbabwe @zimsituation
item.description: Source: New twice-yearly HIV injection set to boost medication adherence in Zimbabwe -Newsday Zimbabwe Health authorities have said the long-acting antiretroviral drug, Lenacapavir (LEN) is expected dramatically improve patient compliance by removing the need for daily pills. The via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation
